title: Borrowing Funds: Debt: Which of the following will likely lead to an increase...
summary: Analyze earnings measurement or manipulation concepts in financial analysis.
prompt: Which of the following will likely lead to an increase in a company's return on equity (ROE)?

options.text: Increasing debt can lead to a higher return on equity, provided that the return
Firm value decreases due to higher risk

solution: Increasing debt can lead to a higher return on equity, provided that the return on the borrowed funds exceeds the cost of that debt. This leverage effect can amplify ROE, making it a critical factor in financial strategy. However, it also increases risk, which must be managed carefully.
